positive: A majestic, stylized Bengal tiger silhouette walking through a grove of tropical monstera and palm leaves. The composition is highly centralized and symmetrical. The style should be a blend of intricate black ink woodcut etching and vibrant, contrasting negative space printing, reminiscent of bold, graphic tattoo flash art. Use a deep jungle teal and earthy burnt orange color palette, with the main subject (tiger and flora) sharply rendered in high contrast black lines against a solid, contrasting white background, making the silhouettes pop for apparel printing. Studio lighting, perfect print resolution, ultra-detailed linework, clean edges, highly graphic, vector quality illustration.
negative: blur, grainy, sketch, photo, realistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, noise, poor composition, low detail, cropped, out of focus
